title: Brave Water Day
subtitle: 阿那亚度假中集：勇敢挑战和喷泉玩水
theme: 海边度假第二天的乐园挑战与玩水
moral: 勇敢不是莽撞，而是在家人保护和鼓励下小心尝试；和别人相遇时懂得礼让，玩水也要穿好装备、注意安全。

pages.narration: 第二天早晨，妈妈、姥姥和大姨带水水去食堂吃早餐。餐线长长的，香味也长长的。
pages.composition_hint: an eye-level wide view of a bright seaside resort cafeteria with many Chinese breakfast buffet lines, bamboo steamers of buns, congee bowls, eggs, soy milk, small side dishes; shuishui stands with a taller white rabbit, a sheep, and a white polar bear in a sky-blue summer dress, all choosing breakfast happily, no other full-body main characters

pages.narration: 水水选了一个紫色紫薯包子。软软的，甜甜的，像一朵小紫云。
pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter close view of shuishui holding and tasting a soft purple steamed bun, a taller white rabbit sitting beside her smiling, breakfast tray with small bowl and soy milk cup on the table, warm morning cafeteria light

pages.narration: 吃完早餐，大家来到儿童乐园。大足球场、篮球场、攀爬网、越野障碍区，全都在阳光里等着水水。
pages.composition_hint: a high-angle wide establishing view of a sunny seaside resort playground with a big green soccer field, several basketball courts, a huge climbing net, and a children's obstacle course area; shuishui, red panda, taller white rabbit, sheep, and white polar bear enter together as small foreground figures, all-animal resort world

pages.narration: 爸爸和水水先来到越野障碍区。长长窄窄的独木桥，两边是软软的绳索扶手。

scene_state.location: 儿童越野障碍区独木桥
props: long narrow wooden balance beam bridge

pages.composition_hint: an eye-level medium view of shuishui carefully stepping along a long narrow wooden balance beam bridge with rope handrails on both sides, low safe height over soft sand ground; red panda walks beside the obstacle encouraging her, clear safe playful scene

pages.narration: 走到半路，对面也来了一个小朋友。水水往一边靠，小朋友也往一边靠，大家礼貌地错身通过。

scene_state.location: 儿童越野障碍区独木桥中段

pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter medium view on the narrow wooden balance beam bridge: shuishui politely leans to one side while a small squirrel visitor leans to the other side so they can pass each other smoothly; red panda watches from the side smiling proudly, rope handrails and soft sand below

pages.narration: 再往前，挑战变难了：脚下变成了绳线，扶手跑到了头顶上。水水要把小手举高高才能抓住。

dialogue.speaker: mama
dialogue.text: 要不要换一个安全一点的玩？

pages.composition_hint: an eye-level wide view at the start of a rope challenge: taut rope lines underfoot and an overhead rope handhold above; shuishui looks up and reaches toward the overhead rope, red panda stands beside her ready to support, taller white rabbit watches with gentle concern, soft safe ground below

pages.narration: 爸爸轻轻扶着水水的腰。水水勇敢地踏上绳索，小手往上一够，真的抓住啦！

dialogue.speaker: mama
dialogue.text: 原来水水已经这么高啦！

pages.composition_hint: a low-angle medium view of shuishui bravely standing on taut rope foot lines while reaching up and holding the overhead rope handhold; red panda supports her carefully by the waist from the side, taller white rabbit watches with surprised proud expression, safe obstacle course setting

pages.narration: 水水一步一步，小心又勇敢地通过了绳索挑战。上午的挑战，成功！
pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter medium view at the end of the rope obstacle, shuishui stepping onto the finish platform with a proud smile, red panda clapping nearby, taller white rabbit smiling with delighted surprise, sunny safe playground

pages.narration: 下午，广场上出现了一条长长的小水沟。石头泉眼咕嘟咕嘟冒水，清凉的水一路流呀流。
pages.composition_hint: a high-angle wide establishing view of a sunny plaza with a long shallow flowing water channel, stone fountain blocks bubbling water like little springs, a large round pool at the start, varied fountains around; shuishui, red panda, and taller white rabbit stand near the water ready to play

pages.narration: 水水穿上防水背带裤，和爸爸一起下水。滋水玩具吸满水，用力一滋，水柱喷到了墙上！
pages.composition_hint: an eye-level medium view of shuishui wearing waterproof wading overalls and a pink floral headband, standing in shallow water with red panda; both hold brightly colored plastic water squirter toys filled with water, spraying a clear stream onto a nearby wall, cheerful sunny splash scene

pages.narration: 好多小动物也在水里玩。有的小动物被喷泉滋到了脸上，大家哈哈大笑，水花亮晶晶。
pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter medium view of a joyful shallow fountain plaza: shuishui in waterproof wading overalls laughs beside red panda while small animal visitors play in the water; a duckling visitor and raccoon visitor are lightly splashed by fountain jets on their faces, everyone laughing, bright sparkling water, safe playful mood

pages.narration: 水池边还有一辆会喷水的单轮动感单车。妈妈抱着水水呼呼一骑，车下面就喷出一条大水柱。接下来还有什么好玩的呢？下集见！

scene_state.location: 水池边单轮动感单车装置

pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter wide view beside the pool: a taller white rabbit pedals a single-wheel water-powered exercise bike installation, shuishui seated securely in front on her lap, and a strong water jet sprays from a nozzle below the bike; red panda watches nearby smiling, sunny plaza, magical playful ending, no text in image
